---
title: "5-Designing-Future-Experiments"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(Cardinal)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
source("Utilities.R")

load(file.path("Outputs","cartilage_results.RData"))
load("Outputs/signift_cartilage.RData")

model_fit_eval <- read_csv("Outputs/feature-model-fit-evaluation.csv") |> 
  mutate(across(qq_normality:outliers, as.factor))

passed <- model_fit_eval |> 
          filter(qq_normality == "OK" & 
            residual_variance == "OK" & 
            outliers == "OK" )

cartilage_models_OK_fit <- cartilage_res[[1]][passed$feature_id]

df_var <- bind_rows(lapply(cartilage_models_OK_fit, function(m) {
  vc <- as.data.frame(VarCorr(m))
  sigma2_subject <- vc$vcov[1]
  sigma2_residual <- attr(VarCorr(m), "sc")^2
  return(tibble(sigma2_residual = sigma2_residual, 
                sigma2_subject = sigma2_subject,
                intercept = coef(summary(m))[1,1],
                condition = abs(coef(summary(m))[2,1]),
                subtissue = abs(coef(summary(m))[3,1])))
})) %>% mutate(id = "Cartilage", feature_id = row_number())


FDR = 0.05
power = 0.9

median.sigma.subject = median(df_var$sigma2_subject, na.rm = T)
median.sigma.error = median(df_var$sigma2_residual, na.rm = T)
median_denom_for_pct_delta = median(signift_cartilage$reference_estimate, na.rm = T)

## Large portion of proteins are not changing
# m0_m1 <- 90 ## it means m0/m1=99, m0/(m0+m1)=0.99
alpha_1 <- power * FDR / (1 + (1 - FDR) * 1)
alpha_90 <- power * FDR / (1 + (1 - FDR) * 90)
alpha_50 <- power * FDR / (1 + (1 - FDR) * 50)


calc_sample_size <- function(desired_difference,
                                 alpha,
                                 power,
                                 variance_estimate_without_I){
  delta <- seq(desired_difference[1], desired_difference[2], .1)
  z_alpha <- qnorm(1-alpha/2)
  z_beta <- qnorm(power)
  aa <- (z_alpha+z_beta)
  denom = (delta/aa)^2
  #numSample <- round(variance_estimate_without_I/denom, 0)
  numSample <- variance_estimate_without_I/denom
  return(data.frame(delta,numSample,FDR,power))
}

comparison_labels = c("In Osteoarthritis: Medial vs Lateral", "In Medial: Osteoarthritis vs Control")


df_curves <- bind_rows(
  calc_sample_size(c(1,150),
                              alpha_90,
                              power,
                              2*(median.sigma.error + median.sigma.subject)) %>%
    mutate(id = "Condition", n_sig_test = 90),
  
  calc_sample_size(c(1,150),
                              alpha_90,
                              power,
                              2*(median.sigma.error)) %>%
    mutate(id = "Subsection", n_sig_test = 90),
  
  calc_sample_size(c(1,150),
                              alpha_50,
                              power,
                              2*(median.sigma.error + median.sigma.subject)) %>%
    mutate(id = "Condition", n_sig_test = 50 ),
  
  calc_sample_size(c(1,150),
                              alpha_50,
                              power,
                              2*(median.sigma.error)) %>%
    mutate(id = "Subsection", n_sig_test = 50),
  calc_sample_size(c(1,150),
                              alpha_1,
                              power,
                              2*(median.sigma.error + median.sigma.subject)) %>%
    mutate(id = "Condition", n_sig_test = 1 ),
  
  calc_sample_size(c(1,150),
                              alpha_1,
                              power,
                              2*(median.sigma.error)) %>%
    mutate(id = "Subsection", n_sig_test = 1)
) %>%
  mutate(comparison = factor(ifelse(id=="Subsection",
                                    comparison_labels[1],
                                    comparison_labels[2]),
                             levels = comparison_labels),
         n_sig_test = factor(n_sig_test,
                             levels = c(1, 50, 90),
                             labels = c("No correction, i.e. a single comparison", 
                                        "FDR correction, 50% true negative rate", 
                                        "FDR correction, 90% true negative rate")))


# ggplot(df_curves,
#        aes(x = delta, y = numSample, color = comparison)) + 
#   geom_line(aes(linetype = n_sig_test), linewidth = 1) +
#   geom_hline(yintercept = 4, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
#   scale_linetype_manual(values = c("solid", "31", "11"), 
#                         name = "Multiple Testing Correction") +
#   theme_bw() +
#   ylab("Miminum Number of Subjects") +
#   xlab("Anticipated Difference of Mean Intensity") +
#   xlim(0, 40) +
#   ylim(0, 32) +
#   labs(color = "Comparison") +
#   theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
#   guides(color = guide_legend(order = 1, nrow = 2, theme = theme(legend.title.position = "top")),
#          linetype = guide_legend(order = 2, nrow = 3, theme = theme(legend.title.position = "top")))
# 
# ggsave("sample_size_curves.png", height = 6, width = 6, units = "in")

greys <- c("In Osteoarthritis: Medial vs Lateral" = "grey70", "In Medial: Osteoarthritis vs Control" = "grey30")
ggplot(df_curves,
       aes(x = delta/median_denom_for_pct_delta, y = numSample, color = comparison)) + 
  geom_line(aes(linetype = n_sig_test), linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 4,  alpha = 0.5, linewidth = .7) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("solid", "31", "11"), 
                        name = "Multiple Testing Correction") +
  theme_bw() +
  ylab("Minimum Number of Biological Replicates") +
  xlab("Absolute Value of Anticipated Percent Difference of Mean Intensities") +
  #xlim(0, 40) +
  ylim(0, 20) +
  labs(color = "Comparison") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0.11,0.5)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = greys) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(order = 1, nrow = 2, theme = theme(legend.title.position = "top")),
         linetype = guide_legend(order = 2, nrow = 3, theme = theme(legend.title.position = "top")))

ggsave(file.path("Recreated-Figures", paste0("Figure-Designing-Future-Experiments-Power.png")), height = 6, width = 6, units = "in")

df_curves %>% 
  filter(n_sig_test == "FDR correction, 90% true negative rate") %>% 
  group_by(comparison) %>% 
  filter(abs(numSample-4) == min(abs(numSample-4))) %>% 
  mutate(pct_delta = delta/median_denom_for_pct_delta)
  
  
  


```
